scripts.test:component: vitest run src/api/is-api-problem.test.ts src/lib/application-settings-query.test.ts src/api/durable-query-ownership.test.ts src/live/live-store.test.ts src/live/transport.test.ts src/live/live-render.test.tsx src/routes/-routes.test.tsx src/components/car-layout/CarFoundation.test.tsx src/components/car-screens.test.tsx src/components/simulator-workbench/SimulatorWorkbench.test.tsx src/components/simulator-workbench/live-availability.test.tsx src/components/simulator-workbench/components/simulated-device-card/SimulatedDeviceCard.test.tsx src/components/simulator-workbench/components/can-trace-table/CanTraceTable.test.tsx src/components/simulator-workbench/components/lighting-status/LightingStatus.test.tsx src/components/simulator-workbench/components/simulated-vehicle-controls/SimulatedVehicleControls.test.tsx src/components/steering-curve-editor/SteeringCurveEditor.test.tsx src/components/steering-curve-editor/components/curve-chart/CurveChart.test.tsx src/components/steering-curve-editor/components/curve-chart/components/draggable-curve-point/DraggableCurvePoint.test.tsx
scripts.api:generate: uv run --project .. python ../scripts/generate_openapi.py && pnpm http:generate && pnpm live:generate
scripts.api:check: uv run --project .. python ../scripts/generate_openapi.py --check && pnpm http:check && pnpm live:check
